name: 准尉 | 法国宪兵特勤队
nameZh: 准尉 | 法国宪兵特勤队
descriptionEn: Aspirants of the Gendarmerie are highly trained military police cadets responsible for assisting in rural combat operations. To say most are eager for action in the field is an understatement. C'est la vie.
descriptionZh: 宪兵队的准尉均为训练有素的军警学员，负责协助农村地区的作战行动。他们的目标不止是原野里的行动，还有星辰大海。 这就是命啊。
